reconciliation.name: Lobanne
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: MC: For each Mugic counter on Lobanne, choose Fireproof 10, Airproof 10, Earthproof 10 or Waterproof 10. Target Creature gains the chosen abilities. This ability can only be used once per turn.

reconciliation.name: Makrabon
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: When Makrabon has a Mugic counter put on it, Infect target Uninfected Creature. MC: Activate or Deactivate Hive

reconciliation.name: Matagore
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: If your engaged Creature is Mipedian Creature, it gains Air.

reconciliation.name: Melke
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Invisibility: Strike 10. If a Mirage Location is on the Battleboard, Melke has an additional Invisibility: Strike 10.

reconciliation.name: Melody of Parasitic Mayhem
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Infect target Uninfected engaged Creature. If Hive is Active, Uninfect all Creatures controlled by an opponent and deal 5 damage to target engaged Creature for each Creature Uninfected this way instead.

reconciliation.name: Mind Strike
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Stat Check Wisdom 30: Deal 5 damage. Stat Check Wisdom 50: Deal 5 damage. Stat Check Wisdom 70: Deal 5 damage.

reconciliation.name: Mipedian Dew Farm
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Scouts have Water. Engaged Creatures with Water have MC: Heal 10 damage to target Creature.

reconciliation.name: Mipedim Lounge
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Mirage: When an Attack Card is played by a Creature in this space, its controller can flip a coin. If tails, that player sacrifices his engaged Creature. If heads, the attack deals an additional 10 damage, and that player can flip again.

reconciliation.name: Mipedim Mirage
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Creatures have Swift 1. Mirage: If an adjacent Creature can move into this space, it must do so.

reconciliation.name: Na-inna
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: 0MC: Remove a Mugic counter from target Creature. If you do, put a Mugic counter on another Creature controlled by the same player. This ability can only be used once per turn. (You must choose a Creature that can have Mugic counters put on it.)

reconciliation.name: Olkiex
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: When a Creature you control has a Mugic counter put on it, flip target face-up Battlegear face-down.

reconciliation.name: OverWorld Embassy at Mipedim Oasis
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: When this becomes the active Location, shuffle any Mirage Locations into their controllers' Location Decks. Mipedian Creatures have Water.

reconciliation.name: Phelphor
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: At the beginning of your turn, you can relocate target Creature to any unoccupied space adjacent to it.

reconciliation.name: Progressive Speed
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Stat Check Speed 30: Deal 5 damage. Stat Check Speed 50: Deal 5 damage. Stat Check Speed 70: Deal 5 damage.

reconciliation.name: Purifying Mud
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Earth, Water: Deal 5 damage, then gain 5 Energy.

reconciliation.name: Ranun
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Damage dealt to Warbeast Creatures you control by Recklessness is reduced by 10. MC: Heal 10 damage to target Creature.

reconciliation.name: Rao'Pa Sahkk, The Ocean with No Water
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Attacks that are either Air or Earth deal an additional 5 damage. (Attacks which are both Air and Earth deal only 5 additional damage.) When a Water attack is played, that attack's controller reveals a new active Location. Mirage: When combat ends, put a Mugic counter on Creatures in this space who were engaged.

reconciliation.name: Ravita Flower
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. Sacrifice Ravita Flower: Put 2 Mugic counters on target Conjuror Creature.

reconciliation.name: Raznus, Assimilated
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: MC: Danian Creatures you control cannot be targeted by Mugic or abilities. This ability can only be used once per turn.

reconciliation.name: Reactive Resolution
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Challenge Courage 15: Deal 5 damage. Challenge Speed 15: Deal 5 damage. If you win both challenges, deal 15 damage.

reconciliation.name: Reality Field Generator
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: When equipped Creature enters a space with a Mirage Location, shuffle that Mirage Location into its controller's Location Deck. Mirage Locations cannot be placed in equipped Creature's space.

reconciliation.name: Reckless Defeat
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: If the opposing engaged Creature has Recklessness, deal damage equal to that Creature's Recklessness value.

reconciliation.name: Reckless Reproach
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: If the opposing engaged Creature has Recklessness, deal damage equal to that Creature's Recklessness value.

reconciliation.name: Rhyme of the Reckless
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: When target attack deals damage, deal the same amount of damage to the Creature that played that attack.

reconciliation.name: Rot Cloud
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: If the opposing engaged Creature has Air, deal 5 damage. If the opposing engaged Creature has Earth, deal 5 damage.

reconciliation.name: Saand
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Invisibility: Surprise. Air 5. At the beginning of your turn, you can sacrifice Saand. If you do, each player removes a total of 3 Mugic counters from among any Creatures they control. If Saand has any Mugic counters on it, sacrifice it.

reconciliation.name: Slashclaw
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: If your engaged Creature has Recklessness, deal damage equal to twice its Recklessness value.

reconciliation.name: Song of Desperation
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Target engaged Creature gains 30 Energy. Discipline Checks and Challenges on attacks played by that Creature deal 0 damage.

reconciliation.name: Song of the Dyad
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Choose one: Heal 10 damage to target Creature. Deal 10 damage to target Creature.

reconciliation.name: Strain of Ash
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Sacrifice a Battlegear equipped to an unengaged UnderWorld Creature you control. If you do, destroy target Battlegear.

reconciliation.name: Strain of Clarity
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Choose one: Shuffle target Mirage Location into its controller's Location Deck. If the active Location is a Mirage, shuffle it into its controller's Location deck and that player reveals a new active Location.

reconciliation.name: Strain of Expensive Delusions
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Destroy all Battlegear equipped to Creatures in the same space as target Mirage Location. Shuffle it into its controller's Location Deck.

reconciliation.name: Strain of Infection
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Uninfect up to three Infected Creatures. Put a Mugic counter on target Danian Creature for each Creature Uninfected by Strain of Infection this way.

reconciliation.name: Strain of the Tide
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Remove any number of OverWorld Creatures in your general discard pile from the game. Heal 10 damage to target Creature for each card you remove this way.

reconciliation.name: Stupefying Tide
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Stat Fail Wisdom 50: Deal 10 damage.

reconciliation.name: Symmetry Slam
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Deal 5 damage for each Elemental Type shared by both engaged Creatures.

reconciliation.name: The Doomhammer
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Equipped Creature deals an additional 5 Attack damage to UnderWorld and Danian Creatures. Equipped Danian Creature has Earth 5. Equipped UnderWorld Creature has an additional 50 Power.

reconciliation.name: The Hunter's Perimeter
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: When this becomes the active Location, Mipedian Creatures gain Invisibility: Surprise. At the beginning of combat, reveal a new active Location. Mirage: Creatures in this space cannot lose Invisibility from Mugic or abilities. Invisibility abilities of Creatures in this space work against Creatures with Invisibility.

reconciliation.name: Titanix
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Intimidate: Courage 50. Intimidate: Speed 50. Recklessness 20.

reconciliation.name: Trampling Tackle
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: If your engaged Creature has Recklessness, deal 5 damage.

reconciliation.name: Tune of Xerium
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Sacrifice a Battlegear. If you do, return another Battlegear from your general discard pile to play equipped to an unequipped Creature you control.

reconciliation.name: Twister of Elements
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Air, Water: Search your Attack Deck for up to three Attack Cards and put them in your Attack Discard pile, then shuffle your Attack Deck.

reconciliation.name: Uboraan
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Fireproof 10. Waterproof 10. Recklessness 15.

reconciliation.name: Viqtarr
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: If Viqtarr has both higher Courage and Wisdom than the opposing engaged Creature, the first attack against it each combat deals 0 damage.

reconciliation.name: Void Dirge
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Remove up to three target cards in one general discard pile from the game.

reconciliation.name: Vyll
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: MCMC: Remove a Mugic counter from target Creature.

reconciliation.name: Warbeast Power Leash
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Equipped Creature has an additional 5 Energy. Equipped Warbeast Creature has Recklessness 5, has an additional 5 Energy for each Conjuror Creature you control and deals an additional 5 damage with attacks.

reconciliation.name: Web Cocoon
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Stat Check Power 50: Your engaged Creature gains Fire.

reconciliation.name: Wind Whip
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Equipped Mipedian Creature has Air. If equipped Creature is a Conjuror Creature, Warbeast Creatures you control have Recklessness 5.

reconciliation.name: Wytod
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Sacrifice Wytod: Choose a new target for target Mugic which only targets a single Creature.

reconciliation.name: Xelfe
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: MC: Target Creature gains Range and Swift X, where X is the number of Mugic counters on Xelfe.

reconciliation.name: Zapetur
reconciliation.runtimeAbility: Sacrifice a Battlegear: Deal 5 damage to target Creature. This ability can only be used once per turn. Sacrifice Zapetur: Destroy target Battlegear.
